src/main/java/top/yumbo/ai/rag/spring/bo.general_idea: Update import statement to reflect the new package location of the LocalFileRAG class.
Remove the conditional property check to make the SimpleRAGService bean always available if missing, rather than requiring a specific configuration flag.
Update import path for LocalFileRAG to reflect its new location in the service package.
Replace javax.annotation with jakarta.annotation to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot from 2.7.18 to 3.2.1 to support Jakarta EE 9+ and modern features.
Set Java compiler source and target to version 21.
Add developer, license, SCM, and distribution management metadata for Maven Central publishing.
Introduce dependencyManagement section to centrally manage versions for Netty, Commons Compress, Commons Lang3, and BouncyCastle.
Upgrade Apache Tika from 2.9.1 to 3.2.3 and remove manual PDFBox exclusions.
Upgrade Commons Compress to 1.27.1 via dependencyManagement to fix CVE-2024-25710 and CVE-2024-26308.
Upgrade Commons Lang3 to 3.17.0 via dependencyManagement.
Upgrade BouncyCastle libraries to 1.79 via dependencyManagement to fix CVE-2025-8916.
Add Netty BOM to manage Netty dependency versions.

.gitignore.general_idea: Add patterns to ignore generated or large model files (Excel templates and ONNX models) from version control.
Ignore temporary META-INF folders created during JAR testing to keep the repository clean.
